sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79556" key="parhmereu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρημερ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n79556.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass the day with</tr_> one or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in doing</tr_> a thing, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">π. τινὶ ἔργῳ ἢ ἀνθρώπῳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.65</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
